insights.description: Overtrading in losing regime: 'trending' has 0% WR but accounts for 33% of trades (10/30)
insights.actionable_suggestion: Reduce trade frequency in 'trending' regime. Consider auto-veto or raised confidence floor when regime='trending'.

insights.description: Weak performance in 'trending' regime: 0% WR over 10 trades
insights.actionable_suggestion: Avoid or reduce trading in 'trending' regime. Set LLM to auto-flat when regime='trending'.

insights.description: Strong edge in 'choppy' regime: 100% WR over 10 trades (overall: 67%)
insights.actionable_suggestion: Size UP in 'choppy' regime. Lower confidence floor by 3-5% when regime='choppy'.

insights.description: Strong edge in 'ranging' regime: 100% WR over 10 trades (overall: 67%)
insights.actionable_suggestion: Size UP in 'ranging' regime. Lower confidence floor by 3-5% when regime='ranging'.

insights.description: Hidden edge at lower confidence: 70-80% confidence signals actually win 65% of the time over 20 trades
insights.actionable_suggestion: Consider lowering confidence floor — these 'moderate confidence' trades are actually winners. Reduce floor by 5% to capture more of them.
